Knowledge Agent

Internal Knowledge Agent

An Internal Knowledge Agent is your company's searchable brain. Staff ask questions in plain language — 'what's the process for client onboarding?', 'how many leaves for marriage?' — and get accurate answers from your actual documents, with the source cited. Starting at ₹2L setup + ₹25k/month.

Starting at

FAQ

Common questions about Internal Knowledge Agent.

What documents can the agent be trained on?
PDFs, Word docs, Google Docs, Notion pages, Confluence pages, and structured spreadsheets. SOPs, HR policies, product docs, onboarding guides, pricing sheets.
How does it handle confidential information?
Role-based access. HR policy content only accessible to HR queries. Financial data only to finance team. You define which documents are accessible to which roles.
Does it hallucinate?
No. It only answers from the documents in the knowledge base. If the answer isn't there, it says 'I don't have that information' and cites the source for everything it does answer.
How is it better than just searching Google Drive?
Drive search finds documents. This agent reads them and gives you the answer. 'What's the leave encashment policy?' gets you the specific rule, not a link to a 40-page handbook.
What happens when a document changes?
We run weekly syncs (or on-demand). When you update a policy document, the agent's answers update automatically.

Ready to deploy Internal Knowledge Agent?

Book a 30-minute discovery call.
